subtitles.original: 残響散歌
subtitles.english: [Song: Zankyou Sanka]

subtitles.original: 誰が袖に咲く幻花
subtitles.english: A phantom flower bloomed upon someone’s sleeve

subtitles.original: ただ そこに藍を落とした
subtitles.english: Simply dropped love there

subtitles.original: 派手に色を溶かす夜に
subtitles.english: On a night when colors melt gaudily

subtitles.original: 銀朱の月を添えて
subtitles.english: Adorned with a vermilion moon

subtitles.original: 転がるように風を切って
subtitles.english: Cutting through the wind as if rolling along

subtitles.original: 躓くごとに強くなった
subtitles.english: Growing stronger with every stumble

subtitles.original: 光も痛みも怒りも全部 抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Embracing all the light, pain, and anger

subtitles.original: 選ばれなければ 選べばいい
subtitles.english: If I won’t be chosen, then I’ll just choose

subtitles.original: 声よ 轟け 夜のその向こうへ
subtitles.english: Let my voice roar beyond the night

subtitles.original: 涙で滲んでた
subtitles.english: Blurred by tears

subtitles.original: あんなに遠くの景色まで 響き渡れ
subtitles.english: Echo all the way to that far-off landscape

subtitles.original: 何を奏でて？ 誰に届けたくて？
subtitles.english: What shall I play? Whom do I want to reach?

subtitles.original: 不確かなままでいい
subtitles.english: It’s fine to remain uncertain

subtitles.original: どんなに暗い感情も
subtitles.english: No matter how dark the feelings are

subtitles.original: どんなに長い葛藤も
subtitles.english: No matter how long the conflict lasts

subtitles.original: 歌と散れ 残響
subtitles.english: Scatter as a song, reverberation

subtitles.original: ただ一人舞う千夜
subtitles.english: Dancing alone through a thousand nights

subtitles.original: 違えない帯を結べば
subtitles.english: If I tie an unwavering sash

subtitles.original: 派手な色も負かす様に
subtitles.english: As if to defeat even the gaudy colors

subtitles.original: 深紅の香こそあはれ
subtitles.english: The deep crimson scent is so beautiful

subtitles.original: この先どんなつらい時も
subtitles.english: No matter how painful the future is

subtitles.original: 口先よりも胸を張って
subtitles.english: Stand tall rather than just talking

subtitles.original: 抱いた夢の灯りを全部 辿るだけ
subtitles.english: Just follow all the lights of the dreams we held

subtitles.original: 逃げ出すため ここまで来たんじゃないだろ？
subtitles.english: I didn’t come this far just to run away, did I?

subtitles.original: ないだろ？
subtitles.english: Did I?

subtitles.original: 選ばれなければ 選べばいい
subtitles.english: If I won’t be chosen, then I’ll just choose

subtitles.original: 声を枯らして 燃える花のように
subtitles.english: Screaming my voice hoarse, like a burning flower

subtitles.original: 闇間を照らしたら
subtitles.english: Once we illuminate the darkness

subtitles.original: 曖昧過ぎる正解も 譜面にして
subtitles.english: Turn even the vaguest of answers into a score

subtitles.original: 夜を数えて 朝を描く様な
subtitles.english: Counting the nights to paint the morning

subtitles.original: 鮮やかな音を鳴らす
subtitles.english: Sounding a vivid tone

subtitles.original: どんなに深い後悔も
subtitles.english: No matter how deep the regrets are

subtitles.original: どんなに高い限界も
subtitles.english: No matter how high the limits are

subtitles.original: 掻き消して 残響
subtitles.english: Drown them out, reverberation

subtitles.original: In the heavenly realm, there is a Lake of Light that controls all worlds,
subtitles.english: In the heavenly realm, there is a Lake of Light that controls all worlds,

subtitles.original: and Kronii would always observe the human world from there out of curiosity.
subtitles.english: and Kronii would always observe the human world from there out of curiosity.
